query:
SELECT 
  s.customerName as serviceName,
  s.externalId,
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  COUNT(*) as serviceCount
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerName IN (
  'Action Smart Group', 'Air Restore', 'Australian Computer Traders',
  'CPM', 'Envest', 'Gateway', 'Salter Brothers Luxury Collection',
  'Smile IT', 'Spicers Retreats and Hotels', 'Wineology'
)
GROUP BY s.customerName, s.externalId, s.customerExternalId, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
ORDER BY s.customerName
LIMIT 20;

  'CPM', 'Envest', 'Gateway', 'Salter Brothers Luxury Collection',

)
GROUP BY s.customerName, s.externalId, s.customerExternalId, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
ORDER BY s.customerName
LIMIT 20;
